transcript: Speaker A: बस मध्ये कुठे बसला होतास? [Where did you sit in the bus?] Speaker B: I sit on widow seat. Speaker A: widow नाही, त्याचा अर्थ वेगळाच होतो. It is a window seat असं म्हणायचं. आणि bus मध्ये काय खाल्लंस? [Not widow, that means something else. Say 'It is a window seat'. And what did you eat in the bus?] Speaker B: I eat पिझ्झा खाल्ला. [I eat pizza.] Speaker A: पिझ्झा? नाही. Pizza. आणि गोष्ट कालची आहे म्हणून eat नाही, ate. "I ate pizza" असं म्हणायचं. Bus कुठून पकडतोस? [Pizza? No. Pizza. And since it's about yesterday, not 'eat', but 'ate'. Say "I ate pizza". From where do you catch the bus?] Speaker B: I pick bus from bus station. Speaker A: Pick? Pick म्हणजे उचलणं. Bus उचलणार का? Catch म्हणजे पकडणं. "I catch the bus from the bus station" असं म्हणायचं. [Pick? Pick means to lift. Are you going to lift the bus? Catch means to catch. Say "I catch the bus from the bus station".] Speaker B: Ohh, माझं pronunciation weak आहे. [Oh, my pronunciation is weak.] Speaker A: काही हरकत नाही. AI teacher try केलं का? [No problem. Did you try the AI teacher?] Speaker B: ती महाग असेल ना? [It must be expensive, right?] Speaker A: अजिबात नाही. Normal English classes पेक्षा 7 पट स्वस्त आहे म्हणून 1 कोटी लोक MySivi वर practice करत आहेत. [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes, which is why 1 crore people are practicing on MySivi.] Speaker B: पण time मिळत नाही. [But I don't get time.] Speaker A: रोज फक्त 15 ते 20 मिनिटं practice पुरेसं आहे. हळूहळू confident होशील. [Just 15 to 20 minutes of practice daily is enough. You will slowly become confident.] Speaker B: Wow, कसं join करू? [Wow, how do I join?] Speaker A: खाली install बटनावर क्लिक कर, MySivi app install कर, sign up कर आणि practice सुरू कर. फक्त 15 दिवसांत improvement दिसायला लागेल. Trial फक्त ₹1 मध्ये 3 दिवसांसाठी आहे. आत्ताच सुरू कर. [Click on the install button below, install the MySivi app, sign up, and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. The trial is for just ₹1 for 3 days. Start now.]
on_screen_text: बस मध्ये कुठे [Where in the bus], बसला होतास [were you sitting], seat widow नाही [not seat widow], It is a window, आणि bus madhe [and in the bus], काय खाल्लंस [what did you eat], Pizza, आणि गोष्ट कालची [and the thing is of yesterday], I ate pizza, Bus कुठून पकडतोस [From where do you catch the bus], Pick, bus उचलणार का [will you lift the bus], Catch, I catch the bus, from the bus station, MySivi, teacher try केलं [tried the teacher], Normal English, 7x Cheaper, 1 कोटी [1 crore], practice करत [practicing], रोज फक्त 15-20 [daily only 15-20], confident, होशील [will become], install, practice सुरू [start practice], improvement, Trial फक्त ₹1 [Trial only ₹1], 3 दिवसांसाठी [for 3 days], आत्ताच सुरू कर [start now]
summary: An AI avatar corrects a young man's English grammar and pronunciation mistakes in Marathi. The AI then introduces the MySivi app as an affordable, time-efficient solution for learning English. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app and try it for ₹1 for 3 days.
